title: Nami Tries to Push the Crew Away
scene: On pages 5–8, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. Nami tries to cut herself off from Luffy’s crew while Zoro and the others see that something is wrong.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Heh... aren't you quite irritable after your shameful loss.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Watch your mouth, punk.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Or your head'll go flying.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'd like to see you try, Cripple.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This isn't the time to be 'bickering!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: This is an emergency!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That's right! If you're going to fight, why don't you do it somewhere other than this island?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'd rather not have outsiders stick their noses in this island's affairs anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Do you still not get it!? I only stuck around with you for the money!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And now that you don't even have a cent, I couldn't care less about you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If it's about the ship, I'll give it back.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: So go find another Navigator and go search for your little one piece or whatever!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Now get off of this island! You're an eyesore!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Farewell.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Ahhh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: brother Luffyy!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm gonna sleep.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Sleep!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: in this emer-gency!? And in the middle of the road!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I don't feel like leaving this island yet,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And I don't really care what's going on this island either...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And I'm sleepy.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So I'm sleeping.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Fine, do what- ever the hell you want!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: You can die for all I care!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You're all out of your minds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's as that insane witch just said! Brother usopp's been killed,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And Arlong's out to get us!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Just what reason do you have for staying on this island any longer!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I, for one, believe in what Johnny said he saw!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's only been a short while,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: But I'm afraid this is where we must part.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: We have no desire to be hunted down and killed by Arlong!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: fine.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: May we meet again someday!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Take care, my brothers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You too!

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
